title: abs
summary: Absolute value or magnitude of scalars, vectors, matrices, or N-D tensors.

title: accept
summary: Accept a pending client connection on a TCP server.

title: acos
summary: Element-wise inverse cosine with MATLAB-compatible complex promotion and GPU fallbacks.

title: acosh
summary: Element-wise inverse hyperbolic cosine with MATLAB-compatible complex promotion and GPU fallbacks.

title: addpath
summary: Add folders to the MATLAB search path used by RunMat.

title: all
summary: Check whether every element of an array slice is nonzero with MATLAB-compatible semantics.

title: and
summary: Element-wise logical AND for scalars, arrays, and gpuArray values.

title: angle
summary: Phase angle of scalars, vectors, matrices, or N-D tensors.

title: any
summary: Test whether any element of an array is nonzero with MATLAB-compatible options.

title: argsort
summary: Return the permutation indices that would sort tensors along a dimension.

title: arrayfun
summary: Apply a function to each element of array inputs, returning either a numeric array or a cell array.

title: asin
summary: Element-wise inverse sine with full MATLAB-compatible complex promotion and GPU fallbacks.

title: asinh
summary: Element-wise inverse hyperbolic sine with MATLAB-compatible complex promotion and GPU fallbacks.

title: assert
summary: Throw a MATLAB-style error when a logical or numeric condition evaluates to false.

title: atan
summary: Element-wise inverse tangent matching MATLAB semantics for real, logical, character, and complex inputs with GPU fallbacks.

title: atan2
summary: Quadrant-aware inverse tangent atan2(y, x) with MATLAB-compatible broadcasting.

title: atanh
summary: Element-wise inverse hyperbolic tangent with MATLAB-compatible complex promotion and GPU fallbacks.

title: bandwidth
summary: Compute the lower and upper bandwidth of a matrix, optionally returning a single side.

title: bar
summary: Render MATLAB-compatible bar charts.

title: cat
summary: Concatenate arrays along a specified dimension while preserving MATLAB semantics.

title: cd
summary: Change the current working folder or query the folder that RunMat is executing in.

title: ceil
summary: Round scalars, vectors, matrices, or N-D tensors toward positive infinity or to specified digits.

title: cell
summary: Create MATLAB cell arrays, including `'like'` prototypes, with RunMat's modern builtin pipeline.

title: cell2mat
summary: Convert the contents of a MATLAB cell array into a dense numeric, logical, complex, or character matrix.

title: cellfun
summary: Apply a function to every element of one or more cell arrays, mirroring MATLAB's cellfun behaviour.

title: cellstr
summary: Convert character arrays, string arrays, or cell arrays of text into cell arrays of character vectors with MATLAB-compatible trimming semantics.

title: char
summary: Convert text, numeric codes, and cell contents into MATLAB-style character arrays.

title: chol
summary: Cholesky factorization with MATLAB-compatible upper and lower forms.

title: circshift
summary: Rotate arrays circularly along one or more dimensions.

title: class
summary: Return the MATLAB class name for scalars, arrays, handles, and objects.

title: close
summary: Close TCP clients or servers that were created by tcpclient, tcpserver, or accept.

title: colon
summary: Generate MATLAB-style arithmetic progressions with optional step size.

title: compose
summary: Format numeric, logical, and text data into MATLAB string arrays using printf-style placeholders.

title: cond
summary: Compute the matrix condition number with MATLAB-compatible norm choices.

title: conj
summary: Compute the complex conjugate of scalars, vectors, matrices, or N-D tensors.

title: containers.Map
summary: Create MATLAB-compatible dictionary objects that map keys to values.

title: contains
summary: Determine whether text inputs contain specific patterns with MATLAB-compatible implicit expansion and case handling.

title: contour
summary: Render MATLAB-compatible contour plots (iso-lines).

title: contourf
summary: Render MATLAB-compatible filled contour plots.

title: conv
summary: One-dimensional linear convolution with MATLAB-compatible padding modes.

title: conv2
summary: Two-dimensional convolution with MATLAB-compatible padding modes.

title: copyfile
summary: Copy files or folders with MATLAB-compatible status, diagnostic message, and message ID outputs.

title: corrcoef
summary: Compute Pearson correlation coefficients for the columns of matrices or paired data sets.

title: cos
summary: Cosine of scalars, vectors, matrices, complex numbers, or character arrays with MATLAB broadcasting and GPU acceleration.

title: cosh
summary: Hyperbolic cosine of scalars, vectors, matrices, complex numbers, or character arrays with MATLAB broadcasting and GPU acceleration.

title: cov
summary: Compute covariance matrices for vectors, matrices, or paired data sets.

title: csvread
summary: Read numeric data from a comma-separated text file with MATLAB-compatible zero-based ranges.

title: csvwrite
summary: Write numeric matrices to comma-separated text files using MATLAB-compatible offsets.

title: ctranspose
summary: Swap the first two dimensions of arrays and conjugate complex values.

title: cummax
summary: Running maximum and index tracking for scalars, vectors, matrices, or N-D tensors.

title: cummin
summary: Running minimum and index tracking for scalars, vectors, matrices, or N-D tensors.

title: cumprod
summary: Cumulative product of scalars, vectors, matrices, or N-D tensors.

title: cumsum
summary: Cumulative sum of scalars, vectors, matrices, or N-D tensors.

title: deconv
summary: Divide one polynomial (or 1-D sequence) by another, returning the quotient and remainder.

title: delete
summary: Remove files using MATLAB-compatible wildcard expansion, array inputs, and error diagnostics.

title: det
summary: Compute the determinant of a square matrix with MATLAB-compatible pivoting and GPU fallbacks.

title: diag
summary: Create diagonal matrices from vectors or extract diagonals from matrices.

title: diff
summary: Forward finite differences of scalars, vectors, matrices, or N-D tensors.

title: dir
summary: Return file and folder information in a MATLAB-compatible struct array.

title: disp
summary: Display scalars, arrays, structs, cells, and gpuArray values in the Command Window without returning output.

title: dlmread
summary: Read numeric data from a delimiter-separated text file with MATLAB-compatible zero-based offsets.

title: dlmwrite
summary: Write numeric matrices to delimiter-separated text files with MATLAB-compatible precision and offset controls.

title: dot
summary: Compute dot products (inner products) of real or complex inputs, optionally along a chosen dimension.

title: double
summary: Convert numeric values, logical masks, characters, and gpuArray handles to double precision.

title: eig
summary: Eigenvalue decomposition with MATLAB-compatible multi-output forms.

title: endsWith
summary: Check whether text inputs end with specific patterns using MATLAB-compatible broadcasting and case handling.

title: eq
summary: Element-wise equality comparison for scalars, arrays, strings, and gpuArray inputs.

title: erase
summary: Remove substring occurrences from strings, character arrays, and cell arrays with MATLAB-compatible semantics.

title: eraseBetween
summary: Delete text that lies between boundary markers while matching MATLAB-compatible name-value options.

title: error
summary: Throw an exception with an identifier and a formatted diagnostic message.

title: exist
summary: Determine whether a variable, file, folder, built-in function, or class exists and return MATLAB-compatible identifiers.

title: exp
summary: Element-wise exponential of scalars, vectors, matrices, or N-D tensors.

title: expm1
summary: Accurate element-wise computation of exp(x) - 1 for scalars, vectors, matrices, or N-D tensors.

title: extractBetween
summary: Extract text that lies between two boundary markers using string or position inputs.

title: eye
summary: Create identity matrices and N-D identity tensors.

title: factorial
summary: Element-wise factorial for non-negative integers with MATLAB-compatible NaN/Inf behaviour.

title: false
summary: Create logical arrays filled with false values.

title: fclose
summary: Close one file, multiple files, or all files opened with fopen.

title: feof
summary: Query whether the file position indicator of a file identifier is at end-of-file.

title: fft
summary: Compute the discrete Fourier transform (DFT) of vectors, matrices, or N-D tensors.

title: fft2
summary: Compute the two-dimensional discrete Fourier transform (DFT) of numeric or complex data.

title: fftshift
summary: Shift zero-frequency components to the center of a spectrum.

title: fgets
summary: Read the next line from a file, keeping newline characters in the result.

title: fieldnames
summary: List the field names of structs, struct arrays, or objects.

title: fileread
summary: Read the entire contents of a text file into a 1-by-N character vector.

title: filewrite
summary: Write text or raw bytes to a file with optional encoding and write-mode control.

title: fill
summary: Create MATLAB arrays filled with a constant value.

title: filter
summary: Apply an IIR/FIR digital filter to scalars, vectors, or tensors with MATLAB-compatible semantics.

title: filter2
summary: Apply 2-D correlation or convolution using MATLAB-compatible semantics.

title: find
summary: Locate indices and values of nonzero elements in scalars, vectors, matrices, or N-D tensors.

title: fix
summary: Round scalars, vectors, matrices, or N-D tensors toward zero.

title: flip
summary: Reverse the order of elements along specific dimensions.

title: fliplr
summary: Flip an array left-to-right along the second dimension.

title: flipud
summary: Flip an array up-to-down along the first dimension.

title: floor
summary: Round scalars, vectors, matrices, or N-D tensors toward negative infinity or to specified digits.

title: fopen
summary: Open a file and obtain a MATLAB-compatible file identifier.

title: fprintf
summary: Write formatted text to files or standard output/error using MATLAB-compatible semantics.

title: fread
summary: Read binary data from a file identifier with MATLAB-compatible size, precision, skip, and machine-format semantics.

title: frewind
summary: Rewind the file position indicator to the beginning of an open file.

title: fspecial
summary: Generate classical 2-D correlation kernels used in MATLAB image processing workflows.

title: fullfile
summary: Build a platform-correct file path from multiple path segments.

title: fwrite
summary: Write binary data to a file identifier with MATLAB-compatible precision, skip, and machine-format semantics.

title: gamma
summary: Element-wise gamma function for scalars, vectors, matrices, and complex inputs.

title: gather
summary: Transfer gpuArray data back to host memory, recursively handling cells, structs, and objects.

title: ge
summary: Element-wise greater-than-or-equal comparison for scalars, arrays, strings, and gpuArray inputs.

title: genpath
summary: Generate a MATLAB-style search path string for a folder tree.

title: getenv
summary: Query environment variables as character vectors, strings, or structures.

title: getfield
summary: Access a field or property from structs, struct arrays, or MATLAB-style objects.

title: gpuArray
summary: Move MATLAB values onto the active GPU with optional size, dtype, and prototype controls.

title: gpuDevice
summary: Query metadata about the active GPU provider and return it as a MATLAB struct.

title: gpuInfo
summary: Return a formatted status string that describes the active GPU provider.

title: gt
summary: Element-wise greater-than comparison for scalars, arrays, strings, and gpuArray inputs.

title: hist
summary: Render MATLAB-compatible histograms using automatic or user-specified bin counts.

title: histcounts
summary: Count observations in numeric arrays using configurable histogram bins.

title: histcounts2
summary: Count paired observations into two-dimensional histogram bins.

title: horzcat
summary: Concatenate inputs side-by-side (dimension 2) just like MATLAB's square-bracket syntax.

title: hypot
summary: Element-wise Euclidean norm sqrt(x.^2 + y.^2) with MATLAB-compatible broadcasting.

title: ifft

title: ifft2
summary: Compute the two-dimensional inverse discrete Fourier transform (IDFT) of numeric or complex data.

title: ifftshift
summary: Undo fftshift by moving the zero-frequency component back to the origin.

title: imag
summary: Extract the imaginary component of scalars, vectors, matrices, or N-D tensors.

title: imfilter
summary: Filter images or N-D arrays with correlation/convolution kernels and configurable padding.

title: ind2sub

title: input

title: intersect
summary: Return common elements or rows across arrays with MATLAB-compatible ordering and index outputs.

title: inv
summary: Compute the inverse of a square matrix with MATLAB-compatible pivoting and GPU fallbacks.

title: ipermute
summary: Reorder array dimensions using the inverse of a permutation vector.

title: isa
summary: Test whether a value belongs to a specified MATLAB class or abstract category.

title: ischar
summary: Test whether a value is a MATLAB character array (char vector or char matrix).

title: isempty
summary: Return true when an array has zero elements, matching MATLAB semantics.

title: isequal
summary: Test arrays for equality in size, class, and content.

title: isfield
summary: Test whether a struct or struct array defines specific field names.

title: isfinite
summary: Return a logical mask indicating which elements of the input are finite.

title: isgpuarray
summary: Return true when a value is stored as a gpuArray handle.

title: ishermitian
summary: Determine whether a matrix is Hermitian or skew-Hermitian.

title: isinf
summary: Return a logical mask indicating which elements of the input are ±Inf.

title: islogical
summary: Return true when a value is stored as MATLAB logical data (scalar or array).

title: ismatrix
summary: Return true when an array has at most two dimensions (m-by-n, including vectors and scalars).

title: ismember
summary: Identify array elements or rows that appear in another array while returning first-match indices.

title: isnan
summary: Return a logical mask indicating which elements of the input are NaN.

title: isnumeric
summary: Return true when a value is stored as numeric data (real or complex).

title: isreal
summary: Return true when a value uses real storage without an imaginary component.

title: isscalar
summary: Return true when a value has exactly one element and unit dimensions.

title: issorted
summary: Determine whether an array is already sorted along a dimension or across rows.

title: isstring
summary: Return true when a value is a MATLAB string array (including string scalars).

title: issymmetric
summary: Test whether a matrix is symmetric or skew-symmetric, optionally within a tolerance.

title: isvector
summary: Return true when an array is 1-by-N or N-by-1 (including scalars).

title: join
summary: Combine text across a specified dimension inserting delimiters between elements.

title: jsondecode
summary: Parse UTF-8 JSON text into MATLAB-compatible RunMat values.

title: jsonencode

title: kron

title: ldivide

title: le

title: length
summary: Return the length of the largest dimension of scalars, vectors, matrices, and N-D arrays.

title: linsolve
summary: Solve linear systems A * X = B with optional structural hints (triangular, symmetric, positive-definite, or transposed).

title: linspace

title: load

title: log
summary: Natural logarithm of scalars, vectors, matrices, or N-D tensors.

title: log10
summary: Base-10 logarithm of scalars, vectors, matrices, or N-D tensors.

title: log1p

title: log2
summary: Base-2 logarithm of scalars, vectors, matrices, or N-D tensors.

title: logical

title: logspace
summary: Generate logarithmically spaced row vectors that mirror MATLAB behavior.

title: lower

title: ls

title: lt

title: lu

title: magic
summary: Generate an n-by-n magic square.

title: mat2cell
summary: Split arrays into cell-array blocks using MATLAB-compatible dimension partitions.

title: max
summary: Return the maximum elements of scalars, vectors, matrices, or N-D tensors with MATLAB-compatible options.

title: mean

title: median
summary: Median of scalars, vectors, matrices, or N-D tensors.

title: mesh
summary: Render MATLAB-compatible mesh (wireframe) plots.

title: min

title: mkdir

title: mldivide

title: mod

title: movefile

title: mrdivide

title: mtimes

title: ndims

title: ne

title: nnz

title: norm

title: not

title: num2str
summary: Convert numeric scalars, vectors, and matrices into MATLAB-style character arrays using general or custom formats.

title: numel

title: ones
summary: Create arrays filled with ones within the MATLAB language.

title: or

title: pad

title: pow2

title: pwd

title: qr

title: rand

title: randn

title: randperm

title: range

title: rank

title: rcond

title: rdivide

title: read

title: readline

title: readmatrix

title: real

title: regexp

title: regexpi

title: regexprep

title: rem

title: replace

title: repmat

title: reshape

title: rmdir

title: rmfield

title: rmpath

title: rng

title: roots

title: rot90

title: save

title: scatter

title: setdiff

title: setenv

title: setfield

title: sign

title: sin
summary: Sine of scalars, vectors, matrices, complex numbers, or character arrays with MATLAB broadcasting and GPU acceleration.

title: single

title: sinh

title: size

title: sort

title: sortrows

title: split

title: sprintf

title: sqrt
summary: Element-wise square root of scalars, vectors, matrices, or N-D tensors.

title: squeeze

title: stairs
summary: Render MATLAB-compatible stairs (step) plots.

title: startsWith

title: std

title: str2double

title: strcat

title: strcmp

title: strfind

title: string.empty

title: strip

title: strncmp

title: strrep

title: strtrim

title: struct

title: sub2ind

title: surf

title: symrcm

title: tcpclient

title: tic

title: timeit

title: times

title: toc

title: trace

title: true

title: var

title: vertcat

title: warning

title: weboptions

title: webwrite
summary: Send data to web services using HTTP POST/PUT requests and return the response.

title: which
summary: Identify which variable, builtin, script, class, or folder RunMat will execute for a given name.

title: who
summary: List the names of variables in the workspace or MAT-files (MATLAB-compatible).

title: whos
summary: List variables in the workspace or MAT-files with MATLAB-compatible metadata.

title: write
summary: Write numeric or text data to a remote host through a MATLAB-compatible tcpclient struct.

title: writematrix
summary: Write numeric or string matrices to delimited text files with MATLAB-compatible defaults.

title: xor
summary: Element-wise logical XOR for scalars, arrays, and gpuArray values.

title: zeros
summary: Create arrays filled with zeros within the MATLAB language.
